story_angle: Liverpool may have the edge if they turn the first 20 minutes into pressure, but Arsenal have enough quality to punish one mistake.
central_question: Can Arsenal survive Liverpool's fast start?
surprising_fact: Sample data: Liverpool have started quickly in recent home matches, while Arsenal have sometimes needed longer to settle away.
why_this_matters: The opening spell could decide whether the away team plays calmly or spends the match reacting.
why_fans_should_care: Both fanbases will have strong opinions about whether the away team can handle that early pressure.
supporting_context: Liverpool recent form note: Sample: strong home starts
Arsenal recent form note: Sample: slower away starts
Tactical note: Liverpool early pressure vs Arsenal buildup
warnings: FACT_CHECK_REQUIRED: sample claims must be verified before publishing.
